hooks.command: python3 -c "import json, sys, os, fnmatch; data = json.load(sys.stdin); path = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', ''); name = os.path.basename(path); patterns = ['.env', '.env.*', 'package-lock.json', 'pnpm-lock.yaml']; sys.exit(2 if any(fnmatch.fnmatch(name, p) for p in patterns) else 0)"
